Chapter 10 — Component Documentation Syn — The API exposes, for every published component: its name, its description field (whatever the designer typed into Figma'

beats.text: Before writing a line of extraction code, it is worth being precise about what the Figma REST API exposes about components and what it does not. The boundary between machine-knowable and human-required facts is the architecture decision that determines everything about how the tool should work.

beats.text: The CLI, sync-docs.mjs, does four things in sequence: fetch the component list from the full file response, extract variant structures by aggregating across component sets, compute coverage metrics, and write output in three formats. The fourth thing , writing output , is where the value is: not in the API call, but in the structured, diffable artifacts that downstream systems can consume without making their own API calls. sync-docs.mjs Variables API endpoint and component response shape

segments.label: 02 / 09 · THE STRUCTURE OF THE TOOL

title: WHAT YOU
GET.
segments.body_html:
Error — Component sets with no description
Warning — Individual component variants with no description
Info — Descriptions present but fewer than 20 characters

beats.text: After one run, four files land in docs-sync-output/. component-inventory.json is the full component list: name, description, variant properties, set membership, coverage flags. Feed this to a documentation site generator or diff it in CI to detect new components added since the last sync.

title: CONNECTING TO
DOCUMENTATION PLATFORMS.
segments.body_html:
The three JSON files are the integration point. How they connect depends on which platform owns the documentation.

Connecting to Documentation Platforms — Storybook does not consume the Figma API directly. The connection works through Code Connect — a Figma feature that link

beats.text: The three JSON files are the integration point. How they connect depends on which platform owns the documentation. Storybook does not consume the Figma API directly. The connection works through Code Connect , a Figma feature that links a Figma component to its codebase implementation by embedding a code snippet in Figma's Dev Mode panel. When configured, a developer opening the Button component in Dev Mode sees the actual import statement and usage example alongside the design.

title: THE FAILURE
MODES.
segments.body_html:
The most common failure is not a script error. It is the empty description field. In practice, most Figma files have lar

The Failure Modes — Published versus draft confusion is the second most common operational problem. The GET /v1/files/:key/components librar

beats.text: The most common failure is not a script error. It is the empty description field. In practice, most Figma files have large numbers of components with empty or placeholder descriptions. The designer who built the component knew what it was for; they did not write it down in a field that felt optional at the time. The sync tool surfaces this systematically and accurately, but the fix requires a human opening Figma and typing. This is design-side work. The CLI produces the report.

segments.label: 05 / 09 · THE FAILURE MODES

title: THE LIVING STYLE GUIDE,
THIRTY YEARS LATER.
segments.body_html: LLM Exercises→Generate and examine.→Apply to known context.→Stress-test a specific claim.→Draft or audit a professional deliverable.

beats.text: The documentation drift problem is not new. It is the same problem that motivated the living style guide concept in the mid-2010s, which was itself the same problem that motivated annotated CSS documentation tools before that. The insight , that hand-maintained documentation becomes stale, and that the solution is to generate documentation from source , has been rediscovered repeatedly as the definition of "source" has expanded.
